extra.reason: Fixed: _FakeTokenizer.apply_chat_template added (recorder-neutral, since it now runs outside _llm_lock by design); backend._chat_template set in _bare_backend(). 4/4 lock tests pass, 181/181 full suite green.

Fixed on feat/unsupported-language-400: _handle_asr_error passes APIException through; _normalize_language_name raises InvalidParameterException (40000003 -> HTTP 400). WS error frame now carries the meaningful message. 186/186 tests green.

Thread-pool diarization measured GIL-bound on H100 2026-07-18 (preprocess 15.3-17.7s x10 at n=10, lockstep completion = GIL round-robin; n=10 wall 35.5s vs 12.8s serialized baseline). Superseded by spec 2026-07-18 change D (process pool), implemented on feat/diarization-procpool. Stage-timing evidence in the spec's Problem section.
